data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for user input sanitization.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where all user input is sanitized or escaped. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific tests or validations related to input sanitization, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected outcome of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence of input sanitization or escaping being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add input sanitization validation step
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete tests that verify all user inputs are sanitized and escaped.
